data.description:
## What
Port list-descendants (BFS-by-type) to rebar._engine_support.descendants.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Dispatches in-process via _DESCENDANTS (full auto-init)
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash (epic/story/task/miss/arity), exact usage string
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8)
data.title: E2.3: port list-descendants in-process
